# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || (apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y)'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")
  - git config --global user.name "GitLab CI"
  - git config --global user.email "ci@company.com"

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 week

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  dependencies:
    - build_job

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - |
      git tag -a "v${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}" -m "Deployed: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
      git push origin "v${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - |
      echo "Release Notes:"
      echo "----------------"
      echo "Merge Request: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
      echo "Commit: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
  only:
    - main
  dependencies:
    - test_job
